subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! By thy precious life, I swear that I have no time or respite to take up the pen. Nevertheless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان بجان عزیزت قسم که فرصت و مهلت مسک قلم ندارم با وجود این محض
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @soul; spirit after death, @naming of children; of individuals, @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium
